title: Mechanica
description: A Minecraft modpack that enhances the vanilla experience with new biomes and structures to explore, new items, decorations, new mobs, quality of life (QOL) mods, as well as optimization mods, but most of all, the Create mod!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8f5c297162ed736e77ef303a76a6d075241c610.png)

✔️ **Completely Overhauled World (Terralith, Structory, Explorify and All YUNG's Addons)**

✔️ **Fully Optimized with Shader Support for Nvidia Graphics Cards**

✔️ **QoL Features**

✔️ **Create and Orgin's Mod**

✔️ **Over 150 Mods!**
